studies.title: Evaluation of "Invirto Therapy" for people with panic disorder: a randomized-controlled trial

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about 'Invirto Therapy', which matches the product 'Invirto - Die Therapie gegen Angst'. The product name appears in the title and full text, and the manufacturer Sympatient GmbH is identified as the developer.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized-controlled trial, where participants with panic disorder are randomly allocated to either the 'Invirto Therapy' intervention group or a control group receiving standard treatment. This randomization to isolate the treatment effect under controlled conditions is the defining feature of an RCT.

studies.title: Research project to test the efficacy of an online follow-up program for patients with anxiety disorder using randomized controlled designs

_verification.reason: The study specifically investigates the efficacy of 'Invirto Nachsorge', which is a follow-up program related to the Invirto product. The product name 'Invirto Nachsorge' is mentioned multiple times in the full text, indicating that the study is about this specific digital therapeutic product.

_classification.reason: The study is described as using 'randomized controlled designs' to test the efficacy of an online follow-up program for patients with anxiety disorder, indicating it is an interventional, experimental study with random allocation to intervention and control groups.
